payment_consistency.label: Payment consistency
payment_consistency.action: Pay all utility bills before the due date for three consecutive months.

savings_ratio.label: Savings ratio
savings_ratio.action: Set up an automatic transfer of at least 20% of income to savings each month.

expense_ratio.label: Expense ratio
expense_ratio.action: Track and reduce discretionary spending to keep expenses below 70% of income.

late_bill_count.label: Late bill count
late_bill_count.action: Use calendar reminders or autopay to avoid missing bill due dates.

recharge_frequency.label: Recharge frequency
recharge_frequency.action: Keep mobile recharges regular and on-time every month.

upi_transactions.label: UPI transactions
upi_transactions.action: Use UPI for regular small transactions to build a consistent digital trail.

wallet_transactions.label: Wallet transactions
wallet_transactions.action: Maintain steady wallet usage for everyday purchases.

ecommerce_orders.label: E-commerce orders
ecommerce_orders.action: Continue using verified e-commerce platforms for legitimate purchases.

digital_activity_score.label: Digital activity score
digital_activity_score.action: Stay active across digital financial channels consistently.

financial_discipline.label: Financial discipline
financial_discipline.action: Combine regular payments, savings, and recharges to improve overall discipline score.

monthly_income.label: Monthly income
monthly_income.action: Explore additional income sources or skill development to increase earnings.

age.label: Age
age.action: Age is not directly changeable, but longer financial history improves scoring over time.

average_recharge_amount.label: Average recharge amount
average_recharge_amount.action: Use a consistent recharge amount each month to show financial predictability.
